text: {{c1::Chunking}} splits documents into passages that balance semantic coherence and retrieval granularity.
explanation: The chunk size directly affects retrieval recall and context quality.
usage: Essential for enterprise document search and legal/medical assistants.
spanish: El chunking divide documentos en pasajes que equilibran coherencia semántica y granularidad de recuperación.

text: Embedding-based retrieval converts queries and {{c1::chunks}} into vectors and uses similarity search to find relevant passages.
explanation: This is the core retrieval mechanism behind many modern semantic search systems.
usage: Used in internal knowledge bases, support bots, and search copilots.
spanish: La recuperación basada en embeddings convierte consultas y chunks en vectores y usa búsqueda por similitud para encontrar pasajes relevantes.

text: Hybrid retrieval combines lexical search with semantic search to improve {{c1::recall}} and precision.
explanation: This is often better than a single retrieval strategy in production systems.
usage: Useful in long-form documentation, product search, and technical support.
spanish: La recuperación híbrida combina búsqueda léxica con semántica para mejorar recall y precisión.

text: {{c1::Reranking}} reorders retrieved passages using a second, more expensive model to improve relevance.
explanation: It often boosts quality significantly with a manageable increase in latency.
usage: Used in ranked search, document QA, and high-precision assistants.
spanish: El reranking reordena los pasajes recuperados usando un segundo modelo más costoso para mejorar la relevancia.

text: Citation grounding requires the system to point to source passages whenever it answers a {{c1::factual}} question.
explanation: This improves trust, auditability, and the ability to verify output.
usage: Key for enterprise assistants, compliance, and regulated domains.
spanish: La base con citas requiere que el sistema señale pasajes fuente cuando responde una pregunta factual.

text: A {{c1::knowledge}} graph encodes entities and relationships that can support structured retrieval and reasoning.
explanation: It is powerful when relationships matter more than raw text similarity.
usage: Useful in biomedical, product, and organizational knowledge systems.
spanish: Un grafo de conocimiento codifica entidades y relaciones que pueden apoyar recuperación y razonamiento estructurados.

text: Long-term memory lets an agent persist important facts across conversations instead of relying only on the current {{c1::prompt}}.
explanation: This is crucial for personalized assistants and multi-session workflows.
usage: Common in copilots, support agents, and domain-specific assistants.
spanish: La memoria a largo plazo permite que un agente persista hechos importantes a través de conversaciones en lugar de depender solo del prompt actual.

text: A strong RAG system is evaluated not just on answer quality, but also on retrieval precision, recall, and {{c1::grounding}}.
explanation: If retrieval is weak, even a strong LLM will produce poor results.
usage: Essential for building reliable enterprise search and QA systems.
spanish: Un sistema RAG fuerte se evalúa no solo por la calidad de la respuesta, sino también por precisión, recall y grounding de la recuperación.
